description: Template variability improves PR AND task MSE, beats generic controls, sham-separated.
PR improves but task MSE does not (same pattern as 7.7z before ridge readout).
Same-feature random projection or nonlinear-lag matches or exceeds the morphology benefit.
Same-budget fixed-template control matches the morphology candidate.
No template variant improves PR or task MSE over homogeneous baseline.
Some templates help specific tasks but no aggregate benefit.
